user.title: Connect to TimescaleDB
user.description: Enter your TimescaleDB connection details for long-term state storage.

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to the database. Check host, port, and credentials.
error.timescaledb_not_installed: TimescaleDB extension is not installed on this PostgreSQL server.

init.title: TimescaleDB Exporter Options
init.description: Configure export behavior, exclusions, and data retention policies. Set retention days to 0 to keep data forever.

data.excluded_entity_globs: Excluded entity patterns (one per line, e.g. sensor.weather_*)
